summary: Iter29 — PUTKI HQ Voita raffle sprint full e2e. Backend pytest 18/18 PASS (test_sprint_voita_engine.py) covering scoring determinism (exact=3+5, goal-diff=3+3, total-goals=0+1, non-stackable), payout cap validation (€500), duplicate-position + invalid-type rejection, public listing 3-gate + feature flag gating, admin CRUD lifecycle, entry duplicate rejection, invalid pick rejection, GDPR Art. 7(4) consent_tag=game_raffle + raffle_legal_basis=legitimate_interest_contest_admin separation, draw locks results + re-draw/edit-after-draw 400. Regression: dispatch_daily 15/15 + streamer_meta 19/19 = 34/34 PASS. Frontend e2e: /voita gated state shows voita-placeholder + AWAITING APPROVAL when feature_enabled=false; when enabled with a fully-gated open raffle, /voita renders voita-raffle-card-pelisignaali-fi with prize total + close countdown; /voita/pelisignaali-fi renders voita-entry-form with 3 radio picks (1/X/2) + 2 score inputs + email + mandatory rules-accepted checkbox AND CONTAINS ZERO SMS/Telegram/marketing checkboxes (confirmed via DOM query) ✓; entry submit lands on /voita/pelisignaali-fi/kiitos with voita-confirmed + raffle-post-entry-preferences + 3 INDEPENDENT UNCHECKED opt-in boxes (raffle-opt-email, raffle-opt-sms, raffle-opt-telegram all default checked=False) + SAVE + SKIP buttons both rendered; ticking raffle-opt-email reveals an email input ✓; direct hit /voita/pelisignaali-fi/kiitos without sessionStorage correctly redirects to /voita ✓; /voita/saannot renders DRAFT — AWAITING SAKO REVIEW banner ✓; /back-office/voita auth-gated, after token entry renders the raffle admin board with status pills (DRAFT/OPEN/DRAWN), new-raffle form (voita-new-slug/home/away/submit), and per-raffle cards (voita-card-{slug} + voita-status-{draft|open|drawn}); ENTRIES count incremented 0→1 after a successful test entry confirming end-to-end persistence. Voita feature flag was toggled on for the run and restored to false (production-gated state) at teardown. 6 leftover pytest-* raffles from prior runs were swept.
critical_code_review_comments: Entry form radio labels (data-testid=voita-pick-1/X/2) intercept pointer events when sticky site-header is in viewport — Playwright reports 'label intercepts pointer events' on direct click. In real desktop UX this is fine (user scrolls past header before clicking). Recommend either (a) reducing site-header z-index in form sections, or (b) attaching the click handler to the underlying input rather than the wrapping label to keep automated tests robust. Workaround used in this iteration: input.click() via page.evaluate.

Admin board uses testids `voita-card-{slug}`, `voita-status-{state}`, `voita-new-form/slug/home/away/submit`, `voita-counts` — review_request mentions `voita-admin-raffle-list` which does not exist; the existing testid naming is fine but worth noting for future test harnesses.
Voita scoring engine is deterministic via raffle_id+entry_id seed (verified by 18/18 pytest passes including draw_locks_results_and_scores).

GDPR Art. 7(4) separation correctly enforced: entry form DOM contains zero marketing inputs (verified via form.query_selector for input[name*='sms'|'telegram'|'marketing'] returned null); marketing opt-ins live exclusively on the post-entry kiitos page with 3 unchecked independent boxes and SAVE+SKIP both rendered.
Drawn-raffle immutability verified: re-draw returns 400 + edit-after-draw returns 400 (pytest test_draw_locks_results_and_scores).
seed_data_creation: One e2e raffle (slug=pelisignaali-fi) was created + opened + entered + cleaned up during the run. The voita_feature_enabled flag was flipped True→False per the agent_to_agent_context_note. 6 leftover pytest-* raffles from earlier iterations were swept via DELETE /api/admin/voita/raffles/{id}. No production data touched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Voita raffle MVP is production-ready and gated behind voita_feature_enabled=false in /api/admin/settings. To exercise the unlocked flow: PUT /api/admin/settings {voita_feature_enabled:true}, POST /api/admin/voita/raffles with slug+teams+kickoff_at+prize_distribution(<=500), then PUT gating.{rules_url_set,prize_distribution_locked,match_populated}=true + status=open. Cleanup: DELETE raffle + restore flag. Frontend testids of interest: voita-placeholder, voita-raffle-card-{slug}, voita-entry-form, voita-pick-1/X/2 (LABEL elements — click input directly via JS to bypass sticky-header overlay in Playwright), voita-confirmed, raffle-post-entry-preferences, raffle-opt-email/sms/telegram, raffle-prefs-save, raffle-prefs-skip, back-office-voita, voita-counts, voita-new-{slug,home,away,submit}, voita-card-{slug}, voita-status-{draft|open|drawn}. Telegram opt-in is INTENT-CAPTURE only (writes consent + opens t.me/putkihq_alerts) — not delivery.
rca of the issue: No issues to RCA — clean sprint. Voita raffle engine, API, public + admin UI, GDPR consent separation, post-entry preferences, drawn immutability, and feature-flag gating all verified end-to-end.
